## PR summary
<!-- Please take some time to make it easier for us maintainers to understand
  and review your PR. Describe the pull request, using the questions below as
  guidance, and link to any relevant issues and PRs. The disclosure section is not
  optional.

  Also, have you hit all [the guidelines](https://numpy.org/devdocs/dev/index.html#guidelines)?

## First time committer introduction
 If you are new to the NumPy community, please introduce yourself. How do you
 use NumPy, what prompted you to make this contribution? We are a community of
 mostly volunteers, and getting to know you helps us trust your judgement
 and welcome you into the community.


## What to do if we haven't gotten back to you after a week or so?
      https://www.numpy.org/devdocs/dev/development_workflow.html#getting-your-pr-reviewed
-->

## Disclosures

- [ ] I am a human contributor and fully understand all the code and comments made here.
- [ ] I understand that the reviewers want to interact with a human developer.
- [ ] I used AI to help with this PR. If you check this, you must describe how AI was used.
